description_long: This kiosk consists of a central metallic unit flanked by two large, vertical advertising banners. The central unit appears to be a compact, stainless steel appliance or vending machine, with a control panel and a small display on top, and a sturdy base with steps or a platform. The banners are rectangular, supported by wide, stable bases, and feature high-resolution food imagery and prominent branding for 'BLODGETT' and 'BLCT-6E-H Mini Combi Oven with HOODINI'. The banners are primarily red with white and black text, and one displays a close-up of bacon while the other shows a muffin. The kiosk is designed for promotional or demonstration purposes, likely for food equipment in a commercial or urban setting. The materials suggest durability and easy cleaning, suitable for high-traffic public areas.
description: A compact stainless steel kiosk with a control panel, flanked by two large, red advertising banners featuring food imagery and 'BLODGETT' branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central metallic unit with its control panel and both advertising banners with clear branding and food images.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness and base of the left banner, with a partial view of the central unit and the edge of the right banner.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the backs of the banners (one with an image, one blank) and the plain back of the central unit.
description_view_3: Angled rear view focusing on the blank back of the right banner and the edge of the left banner, with minimal view of the central unit.
attribute_signage_type: Printed banners with photographic food images and text, placed on both side panels; visible text includes 'BLODGETT' and 'BLCT-6E-H Mini Combi Oven with HOODINI'.
attribute_roof_design: Flat tops on banners and central unit, no overhangs or decorative elements, all surfaces appear smooth and functional.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern commercial with minimalist promotional elements
